items.summary: Dani Olmo insists Barcelona are not worried about Real Madrid's summer spending spree, expressing confidence after the club signed Anthony Gordon and secured back-to-back LaLiga titles under Hansi Flick.

source.title: Olmo insists Barca are 'not worried' about Madrid signings

items.summary: Barcelona are reportedly close to signing 19-year-old left-back Jorge Salinas from Racing Santander, with the club trying to negotiate below his €8 million release clause.

source.title: Transfer Rumors: Real Madrid Ready Olise Bid; Atletico Eye Rashford As Man Utd Make Plan

items.summary: Midfielder Marc Casadó is reportedly ready to leave Barcelona this summer due to a lack of playing time, with Manchester United showing the most interest in the young player.

source.title: Transfer Rumors: Arsenal Agree Gyokeres Swap; Real Madrid Plot Fernandes Bid
